zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 5th Earl of Kildare於大約1363年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達卡斯特萊托時，他的父親Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland46歲，母親Elizabeth de Burghersh22歲。他和Agnes Darcy至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1428年6月24日之前在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達格雷 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 5th Earl of Kildare于大约1363年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達卡斯特萊托时，他的父亲Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland46岁，母亲Elizabeth de Burghersh22岁。他和Agnes Darcy至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1428年6月24日之前在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達格雷 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: FitzMaurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Ciaran, Colm.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Maurice (see Morris 1), ‘son of Maurice’. This surname is common in Ireland, where it has also been Gaelicized as Mac Muiris. The Irish family of Fitzmaurice share a common Norman ancestry with the Fitzgerald family. They can be traced to Thomas Fitzmaurice, whose brother Gerald was the ancestor of the Irish Fitzgerald dynasty. Their father was Maurice Fitzgerald, a Norman baron (died 1176).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Gerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + wald ‘rule’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. There has been some confusion with Gerard . It died out in England at the end of the 13th century. However, it continued to be popular in Ireland, where it had been brought in the 12th century at the time of Strongbow's invasion. It was used in England in the 17th century and revived in the 19th century, along with several other long-extinct names of Norman, Old English, and Celtic origin, and is now more common than Gerard, which survived all along as an English ‘gentry’ name.

variants.name: Jerrold
meanings: Rare variant of   Gerald  , probably a transferred use of the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 5th Earl of Kildare was born about 1363, in Castletown, County Kildare, Ireland, his father, Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland, was 46 and his mother, Elizabeth de Burghersh, was 22. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Agnes Darcy. He died before 24 June 1428, in County Kildare, Ireland, and was buried in Grey Abbey, County Kildare, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 5th Earl of Kildare est né environ 1363, à Castletown, County Kildare, Irlande, son père, Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Burghersh, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Agnes Darcy. Il est décédé avant 24 juin 1428, à County Kildare, Irlande, et a été enterré à Grey Abbey, County Kildare, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 5th Earl of Kildare um 1363 in Castletown, County Kildare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland 46 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Burghersh 22. Er hatte mit Agnes Darcy mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 24. Juni 1428 in County Kildare, Irland und wurde in Grey Abbey, County Kildare, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 5th Earl of Kildare è nato il circa 1363 nel Castletown, County Kildare, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Burghersh, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Agnes Darcy. Morì prima del 24 giugno 1428, nel County Kildare, Irlanda, e fu sepolto a Grey Abbey, County Kildare, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 5th Earl of Kildareが約1363年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアカストレトウンで生まれた時，父Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Irelandは46歳，母Elizabeth de Burghershは22歳であった。彼はAgnes Darcyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1428年6月24日以前にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアで死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルダアグリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 5th Earl of Kildare(이)가 대략 1363년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 카스틀레타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Burghersh(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Agnes Darcy(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1428년 6월 24일 이전 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르에서 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 그레이 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 5th Earl of Kildare nasceu aproximadamente 1363, em Castletown, County Kildare, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Burghersh, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Agnes Darcy. Ele faleceu antes 24 de junho de 1428, em County Kildare, Irlanda, e foi sepultado em Grey Abbey, County Kildare, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 5th Earl of Kildare родился около 1363 г. в местности кастлетоун, коунти каилдар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir Maurice FitzThomas FitzGerald 4th Earl of Kildare, Justiciar of Ireland было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Burghersh, 22. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Agnes Darcy. Он умер перед 24 июнь 1428 г. в местности коунти каилдар, Ирландия и был похоронен в местности гри эбби, коунти каилдар, Ирландия.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Agnes Darcy. Murió antes de 24 de junio de 1428, en County Kildare, Irlanda, y fue sepultado en Grey Abbey, County Kildare, Irlanda.
